name: Web Search (Tavily)
description: Real-time web search powered by Tavily AI. Optimized for AI agents — returns clean, relevant results including news, articles, and web pages. Better coverage for Indonesian and regional content.
author: jankric

variables.name: api_key
variables.label: Tavily API Key
variables.description: Tavily API key. Get one free at https://tavily.com (1000 searches/month free tier).

variables.name: max_results
variables.label: Default Max Results
variables.description: Default number of search results to return (1-10).

variables.name: search_depth
variables.label: Search Depth
variables.description: Search depth: 'basic' (faster) or 'advanced' (more thorough, uses more credits).
